---
title: "chen.ist"
subtitle: "Innovative technology solutions & education for the modern world"
description: "chen.ist delivers digital infrastructure, cybersecurity, cloud services, and technology education for modern organizations. Open-source, UNIX, and Apple solutions for SMBs."
page-layout: full
from: markdown+raw_html
---

:::: {.hero-section}

::: {.container}
::: {.row .align-items-center}
::: {.col-md-8 .offset-md-2 .text-center}
# [Welcome to]{.text-dark} [chen.ist]{.text-green}

```{=html}
<p>Digital infrastructure, cybersecurity & technology education for modern organizations</p>
```

[Book a Free Consultation](https://cal.com/chenist){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg .cta-button target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::

::::

::: {.container .page-section}
## Our Services {.text-center .mt-5 .mb-4}

::: {.row .mt-5}
::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-terminal"></i>
:::

### Digital Infrastructure {.text-center}

Open-Source, UNIX & Apple infrastructure for SMBs. Linux, BSD, NixOS, and the new Apple Business platform.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/digital/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
:::

### Cybersecurity {.text-center}

Blue Team operations: 24/7 SOC monitoring, threat hunting, incident response, and security log analysis.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/services/cybersecurity/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i>
:::

### NIS2 Compliance {.text-center}

Expert NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, and gap assessments for EU entities.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/services/nis2/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-cloud"></i>
:::

### Cloud Services {.text-center}

Migration, infrastructure, DevOps, and cloud security across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/services/cloud/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-code-square"></i>
:::

### Digital Resilience {.text-center}

Business continuity, disaster recovery, and adaptive frameworks for operational resilience.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/services/digital-resilience/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-4 .col-md-6}
::: {.feature-card}
::: {.feature-card-icon .text-center}
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
:::

### Academy {.text-center}

Courses, trainings, microlearning, hackathons, and summer schools in cybersecurity and open-source.

::: {.text-center .mt-3}
[Learn More](/academy/){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.container .page-section}
## Why Choose Us {.text-center .mt-5 .mb-4}

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.security-feature}
### Expertise

Our team brings decades of experience across UNIX systems, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and Apple platforms.
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.security-feature}
### Open-Source First

We build on open-source software and contribute back. No vendor lock-in, no hidden license costs.
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.security-feature}
### Security by Default

Every deployment is hardened from day one. We don't bolt security on as an afterthought.
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
::: {.security-feature}
### Knowledge Transfer

We document everything and train your team. Our goal is your independence, not your dependency.
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.container .page-section}
## Latest from Our Blog {.text-center .mt-5 .mb-4}

::: {.row}
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### [Apple Business: What SMBs Need to Know](/blog/apple-business-smb-guide.html)

Apple's new unified platform launches April 14, 2026 with free MDM, business email, and brand management. Here's what it means for your business.

::: {.text-end .mt-4}
[Read More](/blog/apple-business-smb-guide.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.card-footer}
<i class="bi bi-calendar me-1"></i> March 25, 2026
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### [Open-Source Infrastructure for SMBs](/blog/open-source-infrastructure-smbs.html)

How to replace expensive proprietary software with battle-tested open-source alternatives without sacrificing functionality.

::: {.text-end .mt-4}
[Read More](/blog/open-source-infrastructure-smbs.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.card-footer}
<i class="bi bi-calendar me-1"></i> March 20, 2026
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### [Cybersecurity Best Practices](/blog/cyber-security-best-practices.html)

Essential cybersecurity best practices that every organization should implement to protect against evolving threats.

::: {.text-end .mt-4}
[Read More](/blog/cyber-security-best-practices.html){.btn .btn-sm .btn-outline-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.card-footer}
<i class="bi bi-calendar me-1"></i> April 1, 2025
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.text-center .mt-4}
[View All Posts →](/blog.html){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

:::: {.cta-section .theme-cyber}
::: {.container .text-center}
## <span class="text-white">Ready to build your digital infrastructure?</span>

```{=html}
<p class="mb-4">Book a free consultation to discuss your business needs and get a tailored proposal.</p>
```

[Book a Consultation](https://cal.com/chenist){.cta-button target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.cta-accent .bottom-right}
![Security illustration](/assets/svg/security_on.svg)
:::
::::
